checklist.description: Commit plan splits the work so each commit represents one testable behavioral change, not mixing behavior+tests+codegen in one commit
checklist.name: One behavior per commit

checklist.description: Guide mentions file count (>8), insertion count (>300), or workspace package count (>2) as signals to split
checklist.name: Splitting heuristic

checklist.description: Every commit in the chain includes a Task-Group trailer with a descriptive kebab-case slug
checklist.name: Task-Group trailer

checklist.description: First commit in chain includes Task-Family trailer with a category value (bugfix, feature, refactor, etc.)
checklist.name: Task-Family trailer

checklist.description: Only the last commit in the chain includes Task-Completes: true, and only after verification
checklist.name: Task-Completes trailer

checklist.description: verificationRequired function returns different verification requirements for different change types (tests must pass, CLI must run, config must be validated) — typecheck/lint alone is explicitly NOT sufficient
checklist.name: Verification gate

checklist.description: Guide or code mentions that 2-4 commits is ideal and 5+ means the task should be broken down
checklist.name: Max chain length

checklist.description: Pre-push checklist checks current branch and blocks push to main/master
checklist.name: Branch guard

checklist.description: Pre-push checklist verifies at least one diary entry exists for the change set
checklist.name: Diary entry existence check

checklist.description: Pre-push checklist verifies diary entries include branch:<branch> and scope:<...> tags
checklist.name: Tag completeness check

checklist.description: Generated commit messages include MoltNet-Diary: <entry-id> trailer
checklist.name: MoltNet-Diary in commit

checklist.description: Generated commit messages do NOT include Co-Authored-By trailers
checklist.name: No Co-Authored-By

context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements commit shaping for task extraction: one-behavior-per-commit splitting, task-chain trailers (Task-Group, Task-Family, Task-Completes), verification gate before completion marker, pre-push checklist with branch guard and diary requirements, and no-ship-without-diary enforcement.
